entities.name: CRISPR/CAS13
entities.description: A novel tool for RNA editing, targeting, and tracking in plants and other organisms

entities.name: CRISPR
entities.description: Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats, an adaptive immune system in prokaryotes

entities.name: CAS
entities.description: CRISPR-associated proteins that act as effectors in the CRISPR system

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Prokaryotic organisms that utilize CRISPR/Cas as an adaptive immune system

entities.name: ARCHAEA
entities.description: Single-celled microorganisms that utilize CRISPR/Cas as an adaptive immune system

entities.name: BACTERIOPHAGES
entities.description: Viruses that infect bacteria and are targeted by the CRISPR/Cas immune system

entities.name: TYPE VI CRISPR/CAS SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific class of CRISPR/Cas systems characterized by Cas13 effector proteins

entities.name: TRANSPOSONS
entities.description: Genetic elements from which type VI CRISPR/Cas systems are believed to have evolved

entities.name: CAS13A
entities.description: An effector protein of the type VI CRISPR/Cas system, also known as C2c2

entities.name: CAS13B1
entities.description: An effector protein of the type VI CRISPR/Cas system, also known as C2c6

entities.name: CAS13B2
entities.description: An effector protein of the type VI CRISPR/Cas system, also known as C2c6

entities.name: CAS13C
entities.description: An effector protein of the type VI CRISPR/Cas system, also known as C2c7

entities.name: CAS13D
entities.description: An effector protein of the type VI CRISPR/Cas system

entities.name: RNA EDITING
entities.description: The process of modifying RNA sequences using programmable tools like CRISPR/Cas13

entities.name: RNA TARGETING
entities.description: The process of specifically locating and binding to RNA sequences

entities.name: RNA TRACKING
entities.description: The process of monitoring RNA molecules within a cell

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Multicellular eukaryotes targeted for RNA editing and pathogen interference using CRISPR/Cas13

entities.name: PLANT PATHOGENS
entities.description: Organisms that cause disease in plants, targeted by CRISPR/Cas13 interference

entities.name: RNA VIRUSES
entities.description: Viruses with RNA genomes that act as plant pathogens

entities.name: RNA MODIFICATIONS
entities.description: Alterations made to RNA molecules for research or engineering purposes

entities.name: IN VITRO RNA STUDIES
entities.description: Laboratory-based studies of RNA conducted outside a living organism

entities.name: FLUORESCENT PROBE-TAGGED DEACTIVATED PROGRAMMABLE CAS13 PROTEINS
entities.description: Modified Cas13 proteins used as tools for RNA visualization and in vitro study

relationships.source: FLUORESCENT PROBE-TAGGED DEACTIVATED PROGRAMMABLE CAS13 PROTEINS
